issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Agent Arena
products.tagline: The first public arena for AI agents
products.summaryZh: 首个面向AI智能体的公共竞技场
products.descriptionZh: Agent Arena是一个开放竞赛网络，自主智能体在此参与真实世界挑战、赢取奖励、建立声誉并持续进化。创建或加入任意竞赛，在动态生态系统中解锁智能体的真正潜能。欢迎来到首个为AI智能体打造的竞技场。
products.description: Agent Arena is an open competition network where autonomous agents compete in real-world challenges, earn rewards, build reputation, and evolve over time. Create or join any competition, unlock what your agent can truly become inside a living ecosystem. Welcome to the first arena built for AI agents.

products.name: Gemini Spark
products.tagline: Your 24/7 personal AI agent
products.summaryZh: 你的24小时个人AI助手
products.descriptionZh: Gemini Spark 助你驾驭数字生活。只需下达任务，它便能在后台全天候运行，即使手机和笔记本电脑关机也不受影响。它自主运作，但始终听从你的指令。由你决定开启，且设计为在执行重大操作前会先与你确认。
products.description: Gemini Spark helps you navigate your digital life. Give it a task and it works in the background 24/7, even if your phone and laptop are turned off. It operates autonomously, but always under your direction. You choose to turn it on and it's designed to check with you before taking major actions.

products.name: note.md
products.tagline: your notes and research documentation now a local LLM Memory
products.summaryZh: 你的笔记和研究文档现在成为本地LLM记忆。
products.descriptionZh: 面向Mac的本地优先研究空间。阅读论文、管理文献源、撰写Markdown笔记、引用证据，将文献转化为结构化写作——无需在Zotero、Obsidian、PDF阅读器和写作应用之间来回切换。
products.description: A local-first research workspace for Mac. Read papers, manage sources, take markdown notes, cite evidence, and turn literature into structured writing — instead of juggling Zotero, Obsidian, PDF readers and writing apps.

products.name: Atlas
products.tagline: Every AI tool you use should know how your company works
products.summaryZh: 你使用的每一个AI工具，都应该了解你公司的运作方式。
products.descriptionZh: 贵公司有内部规定。现在所有AI工具都遵守这些规定。
products.description: Your company has house rules. Now every AI tool follows them.

products.name: Sleek Analytics
products.tagline: See who's on your site. Right now.
products.summaryZh: 实时查看谁正在访问你的网站。
products.descriptionZh:
Sleek Analytics 是一款面向现代网络的隐私优先型 Google Analytics 替代方案，提供实时网站分析、无 Cookie 追踪及快速仪表盘功能。自上次在 Product Hunt 发布以来，我们已全面重新设计 Sleek Analytics 的使用体验，并推出多项重大新功能：  
- 网站与产品体验的全面重新设计  
- 支持 Stripe、Creem、Paddle、Polar、Dodo Payments 及 LS 的收入归因  
- 自定义事件追踪  
- 公共 API 访问权限  
- 团队协作支持
products.description: Sleek Analytics is a privacy-first Google Analytics alternative for the modern web. Real-time website analytics, cookieless tracking, and fast dashboards. Since our previous Product Hunt launch, we've completely redesigned the Sleek Analytics experience and introduced several major new capabilities. - Complete redesign of the website and product experience - Revenue attribution for Stripe, Creem, Paddle, Polar, Dodo Payments, and LS - Custom Event Tracking - Public API access - Team Support

products.name: ModuleX
products.tagline: AI workspace that’s already connected to everything
products.summaryZh: 已连接一切的AI工作空间
products.descriptionZh: ModuleX 是一个已接入200多个集成的AI工作空间。描述你的需求，助手便会基于你的数据作答、通过你的工具执行操作，并将工作转化为团队可共同编辑的可视化工作流。若你希望，它会在涉及客户的操作步骤前暂停等待你的审批。无需寻找API密钥：对于一组高级工具，我们提供密钥，或可零加价使用你自己的密钥。无需空白画布，无需设置成本。
products.description: ModuleX is an AI workspace already connected to 200+ integrations. Describe what you want, and your assistant answers with your data, acts through your tools, and turns the work into a visual workflow your team can edit together. If you want, it pauses for your approval before a step touches a customer. No API-key hunting: for a set of premium tools we bring the keys, or bring your own at zero markup. No empty canvas, no setup tax.

products.name: Basedash for Excel
products.tagline: Turn any Excel file into a live dashboard
products.summaryZh: 将任何 Excel 文件转换为实时仪表盘
products.descriptionZh: Basedash 现已支持 Excel 双向操作。将 xlsx 文件拖入代理，即可读取数据、进行分析，并在数秒内生成图表和仪表盘——无需公式，无需数据透视表。随后，一键将任意图表的数据导出为 xlsx 文件，继续在电子表格中处理。对于习惯使用 Excel 的团队而言，这是在其信赖的文件基础上，快速引入 AI 数据分析师、实时仪表盘和协作功能的最快捷方式。从 Excel 到仪表盘，再回到 Excel。
products.description: Basedash now works with Excel, both ways. Drop anxlsx file into the agent and it reads your data, analyzes it, and builds charts and dashboards in seconds — no formulas, no pivot tables. Then export any chart's data back to axlsx file with one click and keep working in spreadsheets. It's the fastest way for teams who live in Excel to add an AI data analyst, live dashboards, and real-time collaboration on top of the files they already trust. From Excel to dashboard, and back.

products.name: SquidHub
products.tagline: Multiplayer mode for humans and AI
products.summaryZh: 人类与AI的多人模式
products.descriptionZh: 大多数AI工具只支持单人单助手的模式。SquidHub是一个多人AI协作平台，团队成员及其AI代理（Squids）可在共享房间内实时协作。无需再在私人AI对话间反复复制粘贴；SquidHub为整个团队提供统一的共享语境，让成员共同进行头脑风暴、规划、写作、构建和决策。自带AI工具，邀请团队成员，在同一个共享语境中协同工作。
products.description: Most AI tools are built for one person and one assistant. SquidHub is a multiplayer AI platform where teammates and their AI agents (Squids) collaborate in shared rooms, in real time. No more copy-pasting between private AI chats; SquidHub gives your whole team one shared context to brainstorm, plan, write, build, and make decisions together. Bring your own AI, invite your team and work together in one shared context.

products.name: LockIn MCP
products.tagline: Let AI block distractions for you when you need to lock in
products.summaryZh: 当你需要专注时，让AI为你屏蔽干扰。
products.descriptionZh: LockIn MCP是首个为AI智能体时代打造的专注力屏障。无需使用可绕过的Chrome扩展，现在你只需告诉最爱的智能体为你屏蔽干扰，它便能原生执行。无法绕过，纯粹专注。
products.description: LockIn MCP is the first distraction block built for the AI agent era. Rather than using a bypassable Chrome extension, you now just tell your favourite agent to block distractions for you, and it can do it natively. No bypassing, pure focus.

products.name: DMV by Agent Community
products.tagline: A community-governed namespace for AI agents
products.summaryZh: AI代理的社区治理命名空间
products.descriptionZh: Agent Community正在为代理网络构建身份层。我们正向ICANN申请[.agent]顶级域名，已获得29,000多名成员和7,000多家公司的支持。通过DMV，开发者可以免费预注册一个[.agent]名称，并获得可分享的身份卡，同时帮助维护互联网命名层[.agent]社区治理的开放性，确保其不受单一公司控制。
products.description: Agent Community is building the identity layer for the agentic web. We are applying to ICANN for the [.agent] Top-Level Domain, supported by 29,000+ members and 7,000+ companies. With DMV, builders can pre-register an [.agent] name for free and receive a shareable identity card while helping keep naming layer of the internet [.agent] community-governed, open, and not controlled by a single company.

products.name: AI Slide Editor by CubeOne
products.tagline: The editor PowerPoint should've shipped
products.summaryZh: 编辑器 PowerPoint 本应随附
products.descriptionZh: CubeOne 是一款可对话的 AI 幻灯片编辑器。描述一张幻灯片，它就能为你设计；或直接放入粗略的笔记和图片，它也能生成精美的幻灯片。指向任意位置，说出你的需求，它便会添加图表、图片或表格。要求它编辑或重新设计样式，它也能照做。所有内容始终保持可编辑状态。
products.description: CubeOne is an AI slide editor you talk to. Describe a slide and it designs one, or drop in rough notes and images and it makes a polished slide. Point to any spot, say what you want, and it adds it: a chart, an image, a table. Ask it to edit or restyle, and it does. Everything stays editable.

products.name: Animdock Motion Templates in the Browser
products.tagline: Create trend motions in your browser!
products.summaryZh: 在浏览器中创建趋势动效！
products.descriptionZh: Animdock 将程序化运动模板转化为可在数分钟内交付的剪辑片段。完全免费，无需注册、无费用、无订阅。可调整参数、实时预览渲染效果，并导出 WebM 和 PNG 格式。
products.description: Animdock turns procedural motion templates into clips you can ship in minutes. Completely free, no registration, no fees, no subscription. Tweak, watch it render live, export WebM and PNG.

products.name: Cewsco
products.tagline: All-in-one AI assistant — chat, images, voice & market data
products.summaryZh: 一站式AI助手——聊天、图像、语音与市场数据
products.descriptionZh: Cewsco是一款高级AI助手。实时聊天、生成图像、语音对话、获取股票和加密货币市场实时情报、管理日程等功能，全部集成于一个应用。无需应用商店，可在任何设备上使用。
products.description: Cewsco is a premium AI assistant. Chat in real time, generate images, have voice conversations, get live stock and crypto market intelligence, manage your calendar, and more — all in one app. Works on any device, no app store needed.

products.name: Aurora Notch
products.tagline: A private notch workspace for every Mac
products.summaryZh: 每个 Mac 专属的私密 Notch 工作区
products.descriptionZh: Aurora 可将 Mac 的刘海或顶部边缘变为私人效率扩展坞，支持快速操作：笔记、剪贴板、日历、专注计时器、媒体控制、小组件及写作工具。兼容 Apple Silicon 与 Intel Mac，无刘海机型可通过顶部边缘使用。提供 72 小时 Pro 试用，无需账户或银行卡。隐私优先设计：数据仅保留在你的 Mac 上。
products.description: Aurora turns your Mac notch or top edge into a private productivity dock for quick actions: notes, clipboard, calendar, focus timers, media controls, widgets, and writing tools. Works on Apple Silicon and Intel Macs, including non-notch Macs via the top edge. Start with 72 hours of Pro, no account and no card. Private by design: your data stays on your Mac.

products.name: VoiceX
products.tagline: Write Twice as Much. In Half the Time
products.summaryZh: 写作量翻倍，时间减半。
products.descriptionZh: 你每天花数小时写邮件、发帖、写文档、做笔记，其中大部分时间都浪费在手指跟不上思维速度上。VoiceX帮你把时间找回来。自然说话，几秒钟就能得到干净、完整的文稿：无需清理、无需重新排版、无需二次修改。同样的输出，时间却只需一小部分。几分钟完成写作，把省下的一小时花在真正重要的事情上。
products.description: You spend hours a day writing emails, posts, docs, notes and most of it is slow because your fingers can't keep up with your head. VoiceX gives that time back. Talk naturally and get clean, finished writing in seconds: no cleanup, no reformatting, no second pass. Same output, a fraction of the time. Do the writing in minutes, and spend the hour you saved on something that matters.

products.name: PageGains
products.tagline: AI-powered landing page conversion audits
products.summaryZh: AI驱动的落地页转化审计
products.descriptionZh: PageGains帮助SaaS创始人无需猜测即可提升着陆页转化率。输入网址，即可获得AI驱动的信息传达、定位、清晰度、行动号召、信任信号及转化障碍的审计报告，并附带可立即执行的实用建议。
products.description: PageGains helps SaaS founders improve landing page conversions without guessing. Enter your URL and get an AI-powered audit of your messaging, positioning, clarity, CTA, trust signals, and conversion blockers — with practical recommendations you can act on right away.

products.name: PixelDrivePro
products.tagline: API & MCP-first Bulk image generation for developers and AI
products.summaryZh: 面向开发者与AI的API及MCP优先批量图像生成
products.descriptionZh: PixelDrive 是一款以 API 和 MCP 为先的图像生成引擎，专为开发者与 AI 智能体打造。通过 REST API 或托管 26 工具的 MCP 服务器，可自动化生成动态素材，如开放图谱图像或电商卡片。赋予 LLM（Claude、Cursor）完全控制权，以编程方式调整图层、替换文本变量，并输出成品图形。内置免费画布预览、19 毫秒边缘缓存重复渲染（零成本），以及原生 ?lang= 翻译功能，支持 70 多种语言。即刻扩展你的视觉技术栈。
products.description: PixelDrive is an API and MCP-first image generation engine built for developers and AI agents. Automate dynamic assets like open-graph images or e-commerce cards via our REST API or a hosted 26-tool MCP server. Give LLMs (Claude, Cursor) full control to programmatically tweak layers, swap text variables, and ship finished graphics. Includes free canvas previews, 19ms edge-cached repeat renders at zero cost, and native ?lang= translation across 70+ languages. Scale your visual stack instantly.

products.name: Paint the Cameras Dead
products.tagline: Postcards for pushing back against surveillance.
products.summaryZh: 反监控明信片。
products.descriptionZh: 并非每个项目都需要一个应用、一个AI模型或另一块屏幕。《Paint the Cameras Dead》是一套实体明信片，专为街头而非云端设计。每张卡片帮你留意那些隐藏在视线中的监控摄像头，追问谁在控制它们，并绘制你的发现。打印它们，分享它们，留在咖啡馆、图书馆或社区空间，今天就能使用。无需下载，无需账户，无需更新周期。只有纸张、关注和一次微小的抵抗。
products.description: Not every project needs an app, an AI model or another screen. Paint the Cameras Dead is a physical set of postcards made for the street, not the cloud. Each card helps you notice surveillance cameras hiding in plain sight, ask who controls them and map what you find. Print them, share them, leave them in cafés, libraries or community spaces, and use them today. No download, no account, no update cycle. Just paper, attention and a small act of resistance.

products.name: Crodox
products.tagline: Slice any task out of your codebase. Merge back clean.
products.summaryZh: 从代码库中切分任意任务。干净地合并回来。
products.descriptionZh: Crodox 将任何任务及其完整的依赖闭包隔离到一个干净、可运行的工作台中。任务完成后，你的更改会以确定性方式合并回去。专为并行交付工作且不丢失上下文的团队打造。
products.description: Crodox isolates any task with its complete dependency closure into a clean, runnable workbench. When you're done, your changes merge back deterministically. Built for teams that ship parallel work without losing context.

products.name: Group Subscriptions by beehiiv
products.tagline: Sell subscriptions to teams, companies, and organizations.
products.summaryZh: 向团队、公司及组织销售订阅服务。
products.descriptionZh: 通过群组订阅功能，您可以将付费新闻通讯销售给整个团队、公司及组织。一次购买，多个席位，零烦恼。
products.description: With Group Subscriptions, you can sell your paid newsletter to entire teams, companies, and organizations. One purchase. Multiple seats. Zero headaches.
